{{Infobox character
| name = Deepwalker Ape
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Deepwalker Ape]] is an [[Underlord]]-level sacred beast that was imprisoned by the [[Underlady of the South]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crusher]]'s body is inherited from a mutated [[Deepwalker Ape]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
